name: lead-enrichment
description: Multi-source lead enrichment, fully routed through the SELAT Router (MPP / tempo-native). Finds and verifies a work email (Hunter), enriches the lead and discovers a phone number (Sixtyfour), enriches the company (Hunter), and fetches a live LinkedIn profile (Fiber). One run chains six paid MPP merchants.

domain.description: Company domain used for email finding and company enrichment, e.g. stripe.com

email.description: Known work email to verify; if omitted, supply the email returned by the Hunter Email Finder step

linkedinUrl.description: LinkedIn profile URL for the live profile fetch, e.g. https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe

steps.label: find email — Hunter Email Finder (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
verify email — Hunter Email Verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich lead — Sixtyfour Enrich Lead (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
find phone — Sixtyfour Find Phone (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich company — Hunter Company Enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
